name: LinkedIn Carousel PDF Generator — Ollama + html-pdf-node + Goo

parameters.content:
## Form Input
User enters carousel topic, brand name, target audience, tone, and number of content slides. All five fields feed into the AI prompt and HTML brand settings.

## AI Slide Content Generation
GPT-4o-mini generates a pure JSON array of slides — title, content (one key point each), and CTA type. Each slide has headline, emoji, subtitle, and bullet points.

## JSON Parse and HTML Slide Build
Code node parses the JSON array with error handling. Second Code node builds a multi-page HTML document with branded inline styles, background decorations, slide badges, and swipe prompt.

nodes.name: Section — JSON Parse and HTML Slide Build

parameters.content:
## PDF Generation
Code node uses html-pdf-node to convert the HTML into a square-format PDF (1080x1080px per slide). Requires npm install html-pdf-node on your n8n server.

## Drive Upload, Sheet Log, and Gmail Send
PDF uploaded to Google Drive. Sheets logs 9 columns with Drive file ID and link. Gmail sends the PDF with LinkedIn posting instructions.

nodes.name: Section — Drive Upload, Sheet Log, and Gmail Send

parameters.formDescription: Enter your carousel topic and AI will generate a complete 7-slide LinkedIn carousel PDF — ready to post in minutes.

values.placeholder: e.g. 5 SEO mistakes beginners make / How to grow on LinkedIn / Morning routine habits
e.g. Startup founders, Digital marketers, Freelancers

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert LinkedIn content strategist who creates high-engagement carousel posts.

Create a LinkedIn carousel with this exact structure:
- Slide 1: Title slide (hook that stops the scroll)
- Slides 2 to N: Content slides (one key point per slide)
- Last slide: CTA slide (follow + engage prompt)

Rules for each slide:
1. Headline: Short and punchy — max 8 words — no fluff
2. Points: Exactly 3 bullet points per content slide — each point max 12 words
3. Emoji: One relevant emoji for each slide
4. Title slide: Just a powerful headline + subtitle + emoji — no bullet points
5. CTA slide: Follow prompt + question to boost comments — no bullet points

Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no text before or after, no markdown backticks.

Format:
[
  {
    "slide_number": 1,
    "type": "title",
    "emoji": "🚀",
    "headline": "Your powerful hook headline here",
    "subtitle": "A one-line supporting statement",
    "points": []
  },
  {
    "slide_number": 2,
    "type": "content",
    "emoji": "💡",
    "headline": "Point headline here",
    "subtitle": "",
    "points": [
      "First bullet point — specific and actionable",
      "Second bullet point — concrete advice",
      "Third bullet point — clear takeaway"
    ]
  },
  {
    "slide_number": 99,
    "type": "cta",
    "emoji": "🔔",
    "headline": "Follow for more tips like this",
    "subtitle": "What part resonated with you most? Comment below!",
    "points": []
  }
]

Return ONLY the JSON array. Nothing else.

parameters.subject: =🎨 LinkedIn Carousel Ready — {{ $('5. Code — Generate PDF').item.json.topic }}
parameters.message:
=

Your LinkedIn Carousel is Ready

Your carousel PDF has been generated and uploaded to Google Drive.

Topic:{{ $('5. Code — Generate PDF').item.json.topic }}
Slides:{{ $('5. Code — Generate PDF').item.json.slideCount }} slides
File:{{ $('5. Code — Generate PDF').item.json.fileName }}
Drive Link:Open in Google Drive

How to post on LinkedIn:

  1. Download the PDF from Google Drive
  2. Go to LinkedIn → Create Post → Add document
  3. Upload the PDF — LinkedIn converts it to carousel
  4. Add your caption → Post!

Generated by n8n LinkedIn Carousel Generator

parameters.content:
## LinkedIn Carousel PDF Generator — Ollama + html-pdf-node + Google Drive + Sheets + Gmail

For LinkedIn creators who want to automatically generate a fully branded carousel PDF from a single topic — ready to upload directly to LinkedIn as a document post. Submit the topic, brand name, target audience, tone, and slide count via the form. GPT-4o-mini returns a pure JSON array of structured slides — title slide, content slides, and a CTA slide — each with headline, emoji, subtitle, and bullet points. A Code node parses the JSON array with error handling. A second Code node builds a complete multi-page HTML document with branded inline styles, background decorations, slide number badges, and a swipe prompt. A third Code node uses html-pdf-node to convert the HTML into a square-format PDF binary (1080x1080px per slide). The PDF is uploaded to Google Drive. Google Sheets logs the run with Drive file ID and link. Gmail emails the PDF to you with posting instructions.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Carousel Topic + Details** collects topic, brand name, target audience, tone, and number of content slides
- **2. AI Agent — Generate Slide Content** uses GPT-4o-mini to return a pure JSON array of slides — title, content, and CTA types
- **OpenAI — Ollama Model** language model attached to the AI Agent
- **3. Code — Parse Slides JSON** strips markdown fences, finds the JSON array, validates it, and extracts form metadata
- **4. Code — Build HTML Slides** reads brand settings (color, font, size), loops slides to build one HTML div per slide with inline styles, background circles, brand tag, and swipe prompt — wraps in a full HTML document
- **5. Code — Generate PDF** uses html-pdf-node to convert HTML to PDF binary (requires npm install html-pdf-node on your n8n server), returns binary data and metadata
- **6. Google Drive — Upload PDF** uploads the PDF binary to your target Drive folder
- **7. Google Sheets — Log Carousel** appends 9 columns including Drive file ID and constructed Drive link
- **8. Gmail — Email PDF to You** sends an HTML email with the Drive link and LinkedIn posting instructions

## Set up steps
1. Install html-pdf-node on your n8n server: `npm install html-pdf-node` (Docker: `docker exec -it n8n npm install html-pdf-node`)
2. In **Ollama — Llama 3,2  Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **6. Google Drive — Upload PDF** — connect your Google Drive OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GDRIVE_FOLDER_ID`
4. In **7. Google Sheets — Log Carousel** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`. Create a tab named Carousel Log with columns: Date, Topic, Brand Name, Slide Count, File Name, Drive Link, Drive File ID, PDF Size (bytes), Generated On
5. In **8. Gmail — Email PDF to You** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_EMAIL_ADDRESS`
6. In **4. Code — Build HTML Slides** — update the BRAND SETTINGS section: replace BRAND_COLOR with your hex color, update FONT if needed
